title: How Can I Access My Account If I No Longer Have Access To My Two-Factor Verification Method? | USCIS
content:
## How Can I Access My Account If I No Longer Have Access To My Two-Factor Verification Method?
If you no longer have access to the device or email address you provided to receive your verification code (for example, if you got a new phone or your email address changed), you can still access your account using the backup code you were provided when you first set up your USCIS online account.
Go to myaccount.uscis.gov On the Sign In page, fill in your: Email Address Password Click Sign In
- Go to myaccount.uscis.gov
- On the Sign In page, fill in your: Email Address Password
On the Verification Code page, click the Enter Backup Code button located under the “Or try another verification method” text. This will take you to the page where you can enter your backup code.
- On the Verification Code page, click the Enter Backup Code button located under the “Or try another verification method” text. This will take you to the page where you can enter your backup code.
On the Backup Code page, enter the backup code that was provided at the time you set up your USCIS online account. Then, click Submit to continue. PLEASE NOTE: The code shown in the image is an example of a backup code. It is not your real backup code and cannot be used for authentication.
- On the Backup Code page, enter the backup code that was provided at the time you set up your USCIS online account. Then, click Submit to continue. PLEASE NOTE: The code shown in the image is an example of a backup code. It is not your real backup code and cannot be used for authentication.
On the Backup Code page, enter the backup code that was provided at the time you set up your USCIS online account. Then, click Submit to continue.
PLEASE NOTE: The code shown in the image is an example of a backup code. It is not your real backup code and cannot be used for authentication.
After your backup code is confirmed, you can add another two-step verification method from the list on the Two-Step Verification Method page: Email SMS Text Message Authentication App To add a method, click Add next to Email, SMS Text Message and/or Authentication App. If you don’t want to add another method, click Skip to continue.
- After your backup code is confirmed, you can add another two-step verification method from the list on the Two-Step Verification Method page: Email SMS Text Message Authentication App
- To add a method, click Add next to Email, SMS Text Message and/or Authentication App.
- If you don’t want to add another method, click Skip to continue.
A new backup code will be shown – save this code in a safe place for future use. Click Continue to return to the USCIS dashboard.
- A new backup code will be shown – save this code in a safe place for future use.
- Click Continue to return to the USCIS dashboard.
If you still cannot access your USCIS online account, you may submit a request for help using the Need Help form or by reaching out to the USCIS Contact Center .
